option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <shape xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:shape="oval"> <size android:width="64dp" android:height="64dp" /> <solid android:color="#E8F4FF" /> <stroke android:width="1dp" android:color="#DDDDDD" /> </shape>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:id="@+id/main" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" tools:context=".DashBoard">
<include android:id="@+id/toolbarSection" layout="@layout/dashboard_toolbar" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="50dp" android:layout_marginStart="10dp" android:layout_marginEnd="10dp" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Dashboard Activity" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/toolbarSection" />
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:id="@+id/main" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" tools:context=".DashBoard">
<include android:id="@+id/toolbarSection" layout="@layout/dashboard_toolbar" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="50dp" android:layout_marginStart="10dp" android:layout_marginEnd="10dp" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<include android:id="@+id/profileInfo" layout="@layout/profile_info" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="10dp" android:layout_marginEnd="10dp" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/toolbarSection" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Dashboard Activity" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/profileInfo" />
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" android:layout_marginStart="0dp" android:layout_marginEnd="0dp" app:cardCornerRadius="12dp" app:cardElevation="6dp" android:padding="12dp" android:backgroundTint="@android:color/white">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical">
<ImageView android:layout_width="64dp" android:layout_height="64dp" android:src="@android:drawable/ic_menu_myplaces" android:contentDescription="@string/profile_image_desc" android:padding="8dp" android:background="@drawable/circle_bg" android:scaleType="centerCrop" />
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:orientation="vertical" android:paddingStart="12dp">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvProfileName" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/profile_name" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="#222222" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvProfileDate" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/profile_date" android:textSize="14sp" android:textColor="#9E9E9E" android:layout_marginTop="6dp" />
</LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout>
</com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>

option.name: originalContent
option.value: <resources> <string name="app_name">Bulkcor 2.0</string> <string name="login_welcome">Welcome To</string> <string name="login_company_name">Bulkcor Trading LLC</string> <string name="login_subtitle">Login to your account</string> <string name="login_hint_username">Username</string> <string name="login_hint_password">Password</string> <string name="login_forgot_password">Forgot password?</string> <string name="login_sign_in">Sign In</string> <string name="dashboard_menu_icon_desc">Dashboard menu icon</string> <string name="dashboard_exit_desc">Exit dashboard</string> </resources>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <resources> <string name="app_name">Bulkcor 2.0</string> <string name="login_welcome">Welcome To</string> <string name="login_company_name">Bulkcor Trading LLC</string> <string name="login_subtitle">Login to your account</string> <string name="login_hint_username">Username</string> <string name="login_hint_password">Password</string> <string name="login_forgot_password">Forgot password?</string> <string name="login_sign_in">Sign In</string> <string name="dashboard_menu_icon_desc">Dashboard menu icon</string> <string name="dashboard_exit_desc">Exit dashboard</string> <string name="profile_name">Apps Admin</string> <string name="profile_date">May 16, 2026 \u2022 10:47 AM</string> <string name="profile_image_desc">Profile image</string> </resources>
